qa_pairs.question: Why should you never share your passwords with anyone?
qa_pairs.answer: Sharing your credentials not only compromises your identity but also typically violates the policies of the service or system they are used to access.

qa_pairs.question: When should an individual change their password?
qa_pairs.answer: You should change your password only if you believe it may have been compromised, may be reused, or is weak.

qa_pairs.question: Is it recommended to change passwords based on a specific schedule?
qa_pairs.answer: No, there is no good reason to change passwords based on a specific schedule, although some organizations may still require it.
